arts.ttl: Fantastic town centre mural of iconic Watford FC win complete
arts.sum: Photos have revealed all the details of a painted mural to an iconic Watford FC 1999 victory at Wembley which saw their promotion to the Premiership.

arts.ttl: ‘Reverting to type’ – Watford vs Sunderland prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Watford vs Sunderland prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Saturday. The post ‘Reverting to type’ – Watford vs Sunderland prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Chakvetadze signs new contract with Watford
arts.sum: The Georgian international has been in outstanding form this season after impressing for his country in the Euro 24 finals during the summer.
